calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-31-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Susan Lee. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. represented Plaintiff, City Housing, Inc. and Defendant, Tyrone Johnston appeared in pro per. Also, present, Ruth Clarke, General Manager of premises and employee of City Housing, Inc. Defendant, Rodd Walton appeared in pro per. The Case settled per oral stipulation of the parties which is read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
